issue_codes.generic_evidence: Only generic definition-change evidence is present for a non-descriptive term.
issue_codes.weak_revocation_evidence: Revocation semantics are not backed by revocation-relevant evidence.
issue_codes.decision_plane_low_assurance: Decision-plane role is paired with a low assurance hint.
issue_codes.high_impact_informative: High-impact decision point is paired with informative assurance.
issue_codes.decision_without_enforcement: Decision points are not paired with enforcement points.
issue_codes.possibly_circular_definition: Definition appears too close to the term label.
